note: v356: The tax set-aside is now engine-only — it uses the live PolicyEngine tax engine as the single source (self-employment + federal + your state's income tax, with each state's real deductions and credits) and no longer falls back to built-in brackets. Removed the QBI toggle and flat-percent option; if the engine can't be reached the card shows a Retry instead of a guessed number. Diagnostic endpoints removed.
